title: erigeron dubius
intro: Erigeron dubius, also known as the pale fleabane or western daisy, is a perennial plant species native to western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron dubius include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Erigeron dubius can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
